mission.title: argo-workflows: feat: allow lastRetry variables in expressions
mission.description:
### Motivation

### Modifications

### Verification

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: Workflow
metadata:
  name: pod-spec-patch
spec:
  entrypoint: whalesay
  templates:
  - name: whalesay
    retryStrategy:
      limit: 5
      retryPolicy: Always
    podSpecPatch: '{"containers":[{"name":"main", "resources":{"requests":{"memory": "{{=(sprig.int(lastRetry.exitCode)==1 ? int(retries) : 1)* 10}}Mi" }}}]}'
    container:
      image: python:alpine3.6
      command: ["python", -c]

steps.title: Apply the configuration
steps.description:
Apply the following configuration to your cluster:
```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: Workflow
metadata:
  name: pod-spec-patch
spec:
  entrypoint: whalesay
  templates:
  - name: whalesay
    retryStrategy:
      limit: 5
      retryPolicy: Always
    podSpecPatch: '{"containers":[{"name":"main", "resources":{"requests":{"memory": "{{=(sprig.int(lastRetry.exitCode)==1 ? int(retries) : 1)* 10}}Mi" }}}]}'
    container:
      image: python:alpine3.6
      command: ["python", -c]
      args: ["import sys; sys.exit(1)"]
```

steps.title: Review the fix
steps.description: The fix was implemented in https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/pull/14450. Review the changes to understand the solution.

steps.title: Verify the fix
steps.description: Confirm that the issue is resolved in your environment by testing the affected functionality.

resolution.summary:
### Motivation

This PR resurrects the older [PR](https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/pull/12722) by @eduardodbr to support last retry variable in expressions. 

### Modifications 
This adds a generic function to replace expressions. My change differs somewhat to @eduardodbr's. I didn't agree with his implementation so I changed it. The actual injection is pretty much  exactly how retries get injected. 

### Verification
Verified with the test.

### Documentation
Modified the docs to add documentation on the `lastRetry` variable.
